feed.title: Seifert Lab
feed.subtitle: We explore the ultrafast dynamics of spins and magnetism, harnessing terahertz fields to control quantum magnets at the nanoscale. Our research pushes the boundaries of spin‑orbitronics, turning femtosecond phenomena into future applications.

entry.title: Paper published - THz Nanoscopy of Spintronic Photocurrents

link.title: Paper published - THz Nanoscopy of Spintronic Photocurrents

entry.content: We show terahertz nanoscopy of spintronic photocurrents. A key step towards resolving ultrafast spin and charge dynamics on nanoscales. Special thanks to Felix Paries, Reza Rouzegar, Georg von Freymann, Daniel Mittleman and Xiaojun Wu. Preprint @ ArXiv
entry.summary: We show terahertz nanoscopy of spintronic photocurrents. A key step towards resolving ultrafast spin and charge dynamics on nanoscales. Special thanks to Felix Paries, Reza Rouzegar, Georg von Freymann, Daniel Mittleman and Xiaojun Wu. Preprint @ ArXiv

entry.title: New Lab Member - Kai-Luis J. Jakob

link.title: New Lab Member - Kai-Luis J. Jakob

entry.content: Welcome to our lab! Kai-Luis James Jakob joins our lab as a PhD student bringing plenty of expertise in nanoscales probing of quantum systems.
entry.summary: Welcome to our lab! Kai-Luis James Jakob joins our lab as a PhD student bringing plenty of expertise in nanoscales probing of quantum systems.

entry.title: New lab in the SupraFAB building

link.title: New lab in the SupraFAB building

entry.content: Excited to share the news about our new lab space in the SupraFAB building of Freie Universität Berlin. It will be home to our newly arriving THz nanoscopy system. Stay tuned - exciting things to come.
entry.summary: Excited to share the news about our new lab space in the SupraFAB building of Freie Universität Berlin. It will be home to our newly arriving THz nanoscopy system. Stay tuned - exciting things to come.
